first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are functionally identical. The scores are the same, and the justifications, strengths, and concerns all convey the same core message, focusing on the candidate's skills and experience relative to the job requirements. Minor differences in wording and the specific examples cited are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect a change in the substantive assessment of the candidate.
